Headline: #N66 Chicago Temporary Reroute near Cityfront Plaza Drive/North Water Street
ShortDescription: N66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Cityfront Plaza Drive/North Water Street.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#N66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Cityfront Plaza Drive/North Water Street.

Eastbound buses will operate via Chicago, Fairbanks, Ontario, Michigan, Madison, and over normal route.

Westbound buses will operate via Washington, Michigan, Ohio, Fairbanks, and over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.
